'''√j-n-dh''' ('''kajanadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quagmire|quagmire]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quagmire|quagmire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √j-n-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kajanadh
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thijanadh || jijanadh || shijanadh || kijanadh
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthujanadh || jujujanadh || shushujanadh || kukujanadh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thujanadh || jujanadh || shujanadh || kujanadh
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thujanadh || jujanadh || shujanadh || kujanadh
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thejanadh || jejanadh || shejanadh || kejanadh
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothojanadh || jojojanadh || shoshojanadh || kokojanadh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thojanadh || jojanadh || shojanadh || kojanadh
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thojanadh || jojanadh || shojanadh || kojanadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || janadh || janadh || janadh || janadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || janadh || janadh || janadh || janadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || janadh || janadh || janadh || janadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || janadh || janadh || janadh || janadh
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæjanadh || jæjanadh || shæjanadh || kæjanadh
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathajanadh || jajajanadh || shashajanadh || kakajanadh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thajanadh || jajanadh || shajanadh || kajanadh
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thajanadh || jajanadh || shajanadh || kajanadh
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shajanadh
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshajanadh
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishajanadh
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shajanadhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshajanadhnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishajanadhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shajanadhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshajanadhnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishajanadhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shajanadhro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshajanadhnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishajanadhro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shajanadhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshajanadhnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishajanadhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shajanadhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshajanadhnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishajanadhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shajanadhng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshajanadhnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishajanadhng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shajanadhya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshajanadhnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishajanadhya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shajanadhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshajanadhnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishajanadhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shajanadhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshajanadhnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishajanadhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shajanadhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajanadhnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajanadhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shajanadhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshajanadhnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajanadhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shajanadhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshajanadhnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishajanadhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shajanadhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajanadhnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajanadhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shajanadhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshajanadhnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajanadhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shajanadhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshajanadhnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishajanadhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shajanadhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshajanadhnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishajanadhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shajanadhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshajanadhnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajanadhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shajanadhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshajanadhnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishajanadhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shajanadhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshajanadhnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishajanadhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shajanadhmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajanadhnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajanadhmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
